source: CardInsider extraction pipeline (v3.1.1 baseline) + redemption_rules transform v1
_note: Adds redemption_rules to 366/376 cards via the kredme-data-pipeline cardinsider extracted JSONs. Also adds card-level points_expiry_months, min_redemption_points, points_clawback_on_default. 10 cards have empty redemption_rules listed in handoff_v4/cards_missing_redemption.csv.
